name: java-lsp
description: Real-time Java code intelligence for Claude — compile errors, go-to-definition, find references, and type info via Eclipse JDT Language Server (jdtls).

pillars.supervised: Fully autonomous — read-only code analysis, no external calls or side effects
pillars.orchestrated: LSP protocol handles diagnostics, navigation, and hover automatically on file changes
pillars.secured: No credentials, no network access beyond localhost LSP socket, no file writes
